T0181.title: Head-of-Household File
T0181.definition: In illicit data trading, a type of record-checking service that retrieves only the household head’s ID photo and information, meaning it provides access solely to the main page of a family household register.
T0181.description: In illicit data trading, this is a specific category of record-checking service. “Single-head full household” means the service can obtain the ID photo and personal details of the household head, but only the information contained on the primary page of the household registration booklet.
T0181.usageExample: “This version, single-head full household, 25u per day per batch.”
